changes_applied.fix: Rewrite description with cost framing + invocation triggers
changes_applied.details: New description leads with the cost frame (10-30 min of mid-validation debugging saved), names what gets caught (dead servers, unseeded DBs, stale builds), explains the auto-fix loop behavior, and lists concrete invocation phrases. 7 YAML triggers instead of the previous 0 explicit triggers (was relying on body text).

changes_applied.fix: Rewrite Rules with WHY instead of MUST/ALWAYS/NEVER spam
changes_applied.details: Old rules were 6 capitalized imperatives. New rules keep the same 6 requirements but explain consequences: 'A failed preflight costs seconds; a mid-validation failure for the same reason costs 10-30 minutes'; 'Two attempts means something isn't actually self-healing'; 'those are intentional decisions the user should make, not silent side effects'; 'skipping breaks the chain'; 'starting the API first wastes time because every check will fail on DB'. Each rule now teaches the model why it matters.

changes_skipped.reason: Skill is already well-scoped and lean (87 lines). How It Works, Report Format, Severity Levels are all clear. Main weaknesses were descriptive (description triggering, rules-as-dogma). Both addressed.

description_before: Run before validation to detect missing dependencies, dead servers, unseeded databases. Auto-fixes common failures, produces CLEAR/BLOCKED/WARN verdict. Prevents mid-validation debugging cycles.
description_after: Run BEFORE any validation session to catch missing dependencies, dead servers, unseeded databases, and stale builds — the failures that otherwise eat 10-30 minutes of mid-validation debugging. Auto-attempts one fix per failed check (start the DB, install dependencies, run migrations) and re-checks. Produces a CLEAR / BLOCKED / WARN verdict and a structured report at e2e-evidence/preflight-report.md. Reach for it whenever someone says 'check before validating', 'why is the dev server down', 'pre-validation check', 'environment health', before /validate or /forge-execute, or when a previous validation FAILed for environmental reasons (server crashed, DB empty, missing env var).
self_review_notes: The cost framing in the description is the real conversion trick — 'save 10-30 minutes of debugging' makes the skill's value tangible instead of abstract. Rules with WHY ages better than rules with NEVER.
